title: Grassy Golden Dutch Grains Pilaf
description: A hearty and nutritious post-workout dish featuring mixed grains and a grassy flavor, cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven, suitable for diabetics and those seeking a healthy meal option.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven over medium heat, adding the olive oil to coat the bottom.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the brown rice, quinoa, and barley, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the Dutch oven, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, covering the Dutch oven with a lid, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the fresh spinach, grass-fed butter, salt, and black pepper.
Continue to cook, covered, for an additional 5 minutes, until the spinach has wilted and the grains are tender.
